packet_markdown:
# Domain West Hollywood building packet

## Snapshot
- Building ID: domain-west-hollywood-7141-santa-monica-blvd
- Address: 7141 Santa Monica Blvd, West Hollywood, CA 90046
- Primary URL: https://domainweho.com/
- Management company: Sares Regis
- Recommended status: rejected
- Last updated: 2026-03-22

## Scorecard
- Quiet: 2 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Management: 2 (medium, evidence count 3)
- Amenity: 5 (high, evidence count 2)
- Community stability: 3 (medium, evidence count 2)
- Location fit: 4
- Pricing transparency: 3

## Risks
- Structural noise risk: high
- Location noise risk: medium
- Security risk: low
- Pricing risk: medium

## Evidence summary
- [official] The official site still markets a full luxury amenity stack with views, sky deck, and upscale shared spaces. Source: Domain WeHo official site (https://domainweho.com/). Note: Official copy describes skyline views, a sky deck, and upscale community amenities in central West Hollywood.
- [review] RealPage resident-review aggregation showed a 4.4/5 average across 276 reviews, which conflicts with the repo’s older management concern. Source: Modern Message / RealPage (https://modernmsg.com/domain-west-hollywood). Note: Search results showed an average rating of 4.4 stars from 276 reviews.
- [review] Apartments.com still lists in-unit laundry and current pricing, confirming that the building remains competitively merchandised. Source: Apartments.com (https://www.apartments.com/domain-weho-west-hollywood-ca/mkn8fgk/). Note: Apartments.com showed current availability, pricing, and in-unit washer/dryer.

## Open questions
- Confirm coworking or conference space and current fee disclosures.

## Notes
Rejected with conflict documented. Current review-platform averages are not bad, but the repo history of structural noise, management churn, and move-in-readiness issues is still serious enough to keep this out of the tour set.
